summary: P11 flow, file/export, OpenAPI, audit and ops UI passed browser smoke and key write-path verification. The remaining major product domains now have real usable frontend pages backed by typed SDK calls and backend APIs. Full project deployability is considered functionally ready for user trial deployment, with production-hardening risks tracked as deferred.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci previously reported moderate audit items. Dependency governance should be handled separately from feature delivery.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.

verification: FLOW template create/default graph/publish/bind passed in browser
FILE upload and list display passed in browser
EXP template creation passed; export job creation returned SUCCESS and resultFileId after backend null snapshot fix
OPM client creation and OpenAPI page load passed in browser
P11 route smoke passed for flow.templates, flow.workbench, files.center, exports.jobs, openapi.clients, audit.system, audit.platform and ops.health
npm.cmd run build passed and generated frontend/dist
mvn.cmd -pl examine-web -am -DskipTests package passed and generated backend/examine-web/target/unexamine.jar
